## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets` and `cargo test --doc` pass
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] One logical change per commit (Conventional Commits)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test; gates are not loosened to pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — design tradeoffs, follow-ups, open questions.
